zh.lifeSummary: 當John Williamson於1475年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉爾斯比時，他的父親Alexander Williamson20歲，母親Alice Zimmerman38歲。他於1493年與Jane Angevine在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年3月24日在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Williamson于1475年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉爾斯比时，他的父亲Alexander Williamson20岁，母亲Alice Zimmerman38岁。他于1493年与Jane Angevine在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年3月24日在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Williamson was born in 1475, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Alexander Williamson, was 20 and his mother, Alice Zimmerman, was 38. He married Jane Angevine in 1493, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 March 1513, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Williamson est né en 1475, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Williamson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Zimmerman, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Jane Angevine en 1493, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1513, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Williamson 1475 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Williamson 20 und seine Mutter Alice Zimmerman 38. Er hat 1493 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Angevine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. März 1513 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Williamson è nato il nel 1475 nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Alexander Williamson, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice Zimmerman, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Jane Angevine nel 1493, nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 marzo 1513, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Williamsonが1475年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーで生まれた時，父Alexander Williamsonは20歳，母Alice Zimmermanは38歳であった。1493年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーでJane Angevineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年3月24日に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Williamson(이)가 1475년 영국 링코실르 지르스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Williamson(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Zimmerman(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 지르스비에서 Jane Angevine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 3월 24일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Williamson nasceu em 1475, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Williamson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice Zimmerman, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Angevine em 1493, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1513, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Williamson родился в 1475 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Williamson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Zimmerman, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Angevine в 1493 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 марта 1513 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Williamson nació en 1475, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Williamson, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice Zimmerman, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Jane Angevine en 1493, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1513, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años.
